name: Cofense Vision
description: This app implements investigative and generic actions to quarantine emails, manage IOCs, search messages, download messages and their attachments

actions.name: Get Message Metadata
actions.description: Retrieves the metadata of the message that matches the specified internet message ID and recipient email address

parameters.name: internet_message_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the email, enclosed in angle brackets

parameters.name: recipient_address
parameters.description: Recipient address of the email

actions.name: Get Message
actions.description: Fetches full content of an email and saves it as a zip file to the Vault

parameters.name: internet_message_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the email, enclosed in angle brackets

parameters.name: recipient_address
parameters.description: Recipient address of the email

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password to protect the zip file

actions.name: Get Message Attachment
actions.description: Fetches an attachment by using its MD5 or SHA256 hash and saves it to the Vault

parameters.name: md5
parameters.description: Hex-encoded string that represents an attachment's MD5 hash

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: Hex-encoded string that represents an attachment's SHA256 hash

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: File name including the extension to give to the file

actions.name: List Quarantine Jobs
actions.description: Fetches a list of matching quarantine jobs

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Start page of the results. The value must be a positive integer or 0

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. The value must be a positive integer up to 2000

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The name-value pair defining the order of the response. Comma separated values are supported

parameters.name: exclude_quarantine_emails
parameters.description: Whether to remove (true) or not remove (false) quarantined emails from the response

parameters.name: include_status
parameters.description: Filters quarantine jobs by including emails with the specified status. Supports comma-separated values

parameters.name: exclude_status
parameters.description: Filters quarantine jobs by excluding emails with the specified status. Supports comma-separated values

parameters.name: iocs
parameters.description: Unique MD5 hash identifier of one or more IOCs. Comma separated values are supported

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: One or more configured IOC sources. Comma separated values are supported

parameters.name: modified_date_after
parameters.description: Emails modified after this date and time. The date and time must be in UTC

parameters.name: auto_quarantine
parameters.description: Whether to list only auto quarantine jobs (true) or both (false)

actions.name: Create Quarantine Job
actions.description: Creates a new quarantine job

parameters.name: quarantine_emails
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of quarantine emails, specifying the recipient address and internet message ID of the email

actions.name: Restore Quarantine Job
actions.description: Restores emails quarantined by the job identified by the ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the quarantine job in cofense vision to be restored

actions.name: List Message Searches
actions.description: Retrieves the list of searches

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The start page of the results. The value must be a positive integer or 0

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results to retrieve per page. The value must be a positive integer up to 2000

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The name-value pair defining the order of the response. Comma separated values are supported

actions.name: Get Message Search
actions.description: Retrieves the search identified by an ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID that cofense vision has assigned to a search

actions.name: Get Quarantine Job
actions.description: Retrieves quarantine job identified by the ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the quarantine job in cofense vision to be retrieved

actions.name: Approve Quarantine Job
actions.description: Approves the quarantine job identified by the ID. When the Auto Quarantine feature is configured to require manual approvals, this endpoint can approve the pending quarantine jobs

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the quarantine job in cofense vision to be approved

parameters.name: message_count
parameters.description: Number of emails containing IOC matches to be quarantined

actions.name: Delete Quarantine Job
actions.description: Deletes the quarantine job identified by the ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the quarantine job in cofense vision to be deleted

actions.name: Get Messagesearch Results
actions.description: Retrieves the results for the search identified by the search ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID that cofense vision has assigned to a search

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Start page of the results. The value must be a positive integer or 0

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results to fetch per page. The value must be a positive integer up to 2000

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The name-value pair defining the order of the response. Comma separated values are supported

actions.name: Delete Ioc
actions.description: Deletes a single active or expired IOC from the local IOC Repository

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MD5 ID of the IOC to be deleted

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: A single IOC source value, to fetch the IOCs added or modified by that particular source

actions.name: Stop Quarantine Job
actions.description: Issues a request to stop the quarantine job identified by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the quarantine job in cofense vision to be stopped

actions.name: Create Message Search
actions.description: Creates a new search based on the user-specified filters

parameters.name: subjects
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of subjects to create a search for an email's subject. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: senders
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of senders to create a search for an email's sender. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: attachment_names
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of attachment names to create a search for an email's attachments. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: attachment_hash_match_criteria
parameters.description: The type of matching performed on the hashes specified in the attachment_hashes argument. Allowed values are ANY and ALL

parameters.name: attachment_hashes
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of attachment hashes to create a search for an email's attachment hashes. Supported format: hashtype1:hashvalue1. Example : md5:938c2cc0dcc05f2b68c4287040cfcf71. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: attachment_mime_types
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of MIME types to create a search for an email's attachment MIME type. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: attachment_exclude_mime_types
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of MIME types to create a search for excluding an email's attachment MIME type. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: domain_match_criteria
parameters.description: The type of matching to perform on the domains specified in the domains argument. Allowed values ANY and ALL

parameters.name: domains
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of domains to create a search for domains in an email's body or its attachment. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: headers
parameters.description: A comma-separated string of key-value pairs, defining the additional criteria to search for in the email header. Max 3 values are allowed

parameters.name: internet_message_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the email, enclosed in angle brackets. This argument is case-sensitive

parameters.name: partial_ingest
parameters.description: Whether to create a search with partially ingested emails (true) or without partially ingested emails (false)

parameters.name: received_after_date
parameters.description: Date and time to create a search for emails which are received on or after the specified UTC date and time

parameters.name: received_before_date
parameters.description: Date and time to create a search for emails which are received before or on the specified UTC date and time

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Create a search with the specified recipient. Supports one or more wildcard characters (*) in any position of a recipient's email address

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Create a search with the specified url. Supports one or more wildcard characters (*) in any position of the URL

actions.name: Get Last Ioc
actions.description: Retrieves the last updated IOC from the local IOC Repository. It may return an active or an expired IOC

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: A single IOC source value, to fetch the IOCs added or modified by that particular source

actions.name: Update Iocs
actions.description: Updates one or more IOCs stored in the local IOC repository

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Single IOC source

parameters.name: iocs_json
parameters.description: List of JSON data containing IOC detail to be updated in the IOC local repository

parameters.name: threat_type
parameters.description: Type of IOC

parameters.name: threat_value
parameters.description: Actual value of the IOC to match in the email

parameters.name: threat_level
parameters.description: The severity of the IOC

parameters.name: source_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier assigned by the IOC source

parameters.name: created_at
parameters.description: The UTC date and time the IOC source included the IOC for the first time

parameters.name: updated_at
parameters.description: The UTC date and time the IOC source last updated the IOC

parameters.name: requested_expiration
parameters.description: Expiration date and time for this IOC in UTC

actions.name: Update Ioc
actions.description: Updates the IOC identified by its unique MD5 ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the IOC to be updated

parameters.name: expires_at
parameters.description: Expiration date and time of the IOC in UTC

actions.name: List Iocs
actions.description: Lists the IOCs stored in the local IOC Repository

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: A single IOC source value

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Include only IOCs that were added to the repository after the given UTC date

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Start page of the results. The value must be a positive integer or 0

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of results to fetch per page. The value must be a positive integer up to 2000

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The name-value pair defining the order of the response. Comma separated values are supported

parameters.name: include_expired
parameters.description: Whether to include expired IOCs (true) or not include expired IOCs (false)

actions.name: Get Ioc
actions.description: Retrieves the IOC identified by its unique MD5 ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The MD5 ID of the IOC

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: A single IOC source value, to fetch the IOCs added or modified by that particular source

actions.name: List Searchable Headers
actions.description: Retrieves a list of configured header keys that can be used to create a message search

actions.name: Download Logs
actions.description: Downloads the log files for all Cofense Vision components
